'''{{PAGENAME}}''' are structures that make up the majority of the [[layers]] in-game. They can be destroyed from digging, falls, or explosions. Destroyed tiles are permanently removed from the layer.
<div style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
{| class="wikitable" style="margin: 0 auto; text-align: left;"
|+ List of all tiles in the game
|-
| ID
! Sprite
! style="width: 10em" | Name
! Hit points
! <abbr title="Metallic tiles can be dug much faster with a Plasma Cutter">Metallic</abbr>
! style="min-width: 20em" | Notes
! [[Sleep quality]]
|-
| 0 
| style="border: none; display: block; min-height: 70px" |
| Air
| style="text-align: center" | 0
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| Internally considered as a tile by the game
| style="color: black; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="its air you can't sleep on it duh">N/A</abbr>
|-
| 1
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Rock.png]]
| Light rock
| style="text-align: center" | 100
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 2
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Gravel.png]]
| Gravel
| style="text-align: center" | 25
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 3
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Scrap_pile.png]]
| Scrap
| style="text-align: center" | 60
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 50% chance of spawning a [[Scrap metal]] when broken.
Can be placed with [[Scrap metal]] with 25% condition.
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 4
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Trash_pile.png]]
| Trash
| style="text-align: center" | 20
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 5
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Concrete_tile.png]]
| Concrete
| style="text-align: center" | 800
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 6
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Steel_tile.png]]
| Steel tile
| style="text-align: center" | 5000
| style="text-align: center" | {{Yes}}
|
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 7
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Glass.png]]
| Glass
| style="text-align: center" | 30
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 40% chance of spawning a [[Glass shard]] when broken.
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 8
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Rubber.png]]
| Rubber
| style="text-align: center" | 60
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|50% chance of spawning a [[Plastic chunk]] when broken.
| style="color: lime; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration +25%">Good</abbr>
|-
| 9
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Plastic.png]]
| Plastic
| style="text-align: center" | 150
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|50% chance of spawning a [[Plastic chunk]] when broken.
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 10
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Heat-resistant_alloy.png]]
| Heat resistant alloy
| style="text-align: center" | 15000
| style="text-align: center" | {{Yes}}
| Most durable tile in the game
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 11
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Wood.png]]
| Wood
| style="text-align: center" | 150
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|Spawns [[Wood scraps]], [[Wood panel]], or [[Stick]] when broken. 
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 12
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Sand.png]]
| Sand
| style="text-align: center" | 15
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: lime; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration +25%">Good</abbr>
|-
| 13
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Sandstone.png]]
| Sandstone
| style="text-align: center" | 90
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 14
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Infinirock.png]]
| Infinirock
| style="text-align: center" | 1000000000
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| The border of all layers. While it technically has finite hit points, it is practically indestructible
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 15
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Clay.png]]
| Clay
| style="text-align: center" | 25
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 16
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Soil.png]]
| Soil
| style="text-align: center" | 32
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 17
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Granite.png]]
| Granite
| style="text-align: center" | 200
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 18
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Marble.png]]
| Marble
| style="text-align: center" | 150
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 19
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Limestone.png]]
| Limestone
| style="text-align: center" | 135
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 20
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Bricks.png]]
| Bricks
| style="text-align: center" | 650
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 21
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Scaffolding.png]]
| Scaffolding
| style="text-align: center" | 200
| style="text-align: center" | {{Yes}}
| Placeable with [[Scaffolding pack]]
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 22
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Toxirock.png]]
| Toxirock
| style="text-align: center" | 250
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| [[Radiation|Irradiates]] the player considerably quickly if stood on (up to +0.75 Gy per second).
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 23
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Grass.png|55px]]
|  Verdure
| style="text-align: center" | 35
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: lime; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration +25%">Good</abbr>
|-
| 24
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Log.png|45px]]
| Log
| style="text-align: center" | 150
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| Spawns [[Wood scraps]], [[Wood panel]], or [[Stick]] when broken.
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 25
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Leaves.png|55px]]
| Leaves
| style="text-align: center" | 20
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 26
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Snow.png|50px]]
| Snow
| style="text-align: center" | 15
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: lime; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration +25%">Good</abbr>
|-
| 27
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Ice.png|55px]]
| Ice
| style="text-align: center" | 50
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 50% chance of spawning water when broken.
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 28
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Thinice.png|45px]]
| Thin ice
| style="text-align: center" | 1
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 29
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Powdersnow.png|55px]]
| Powdersnow
| style="text-align: center" | 1
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: lime; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration +25%">Good</abbr>
|-
| 30
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Heavyrock.png|55px]]
| Heavy rock
| style="text-align: center" | 200
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 31
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Fungus.png|50px]]
| Fungus
| style="text-align: center" | 50
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
| 
| style="color: grey; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration: No effects">Okay</abbr>
|-
| 32
| style="text-align: center" | [[File:Mushroombody.png|50px]]
| Mushroom body
| style="text-align: center" | 80
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 33
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Mushroomcap.png|50px]]
| Mushroom cap
| style="text-align: center" | 60
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|
| style="color: orange; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -15%">Mediocre</abbr>
|-
| 34
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Copper.png|50px]]
| Copper
| style="text-align: center" | 2000
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|Spawns [[Raw copper]] when broken
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|-
| 35
| style="text-align: center" |[[File:Ilmenite.png|50px]]
| Ilmenite
| style="text-align: center" | 4000
| style="text-align: center" | {{No}}
|Spawns [[Ilmenite chunk]] when broken
| style="color: red; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;" | <abbr title="Energy regeneration -30%">Bad</abbr>
|}
</div>See also: [[Tile Fluids|Tile fluids]] for the similar liquid tiles placed in the world.

== Trivia ==
* Each tile represents a 0.3m by 0.3m block.

[[zh:物块]]
